recommendations.title: Long Story Short
recommendations.overview: Teddy wakes up the morning after his wedding to discover that he's jumped forward a year in his life to his first anniversary. Trapped in an endless cycle of time jumps, transported another year ahead every few minutes, he is faced with a race agains

recommendations.title: Here Comes Mr. Jordan
recommendations.overview: Boxer Joe Pendleton, flying to his next fight, crashes...because a Heavenly Messenger, new on the job, snatched Joe's spirit prematurely from his body. Before the matter can be rectified, Joe's body is cremated; so the celestial Mr. Jordan grants him

recommendations.title: Bad Johnson
recommendations.overview: With women practically throwing themselves at him, Rich can’t control himself. But he continually blames his penis, which seems to have a mind of its own. After ruining yet another promising relationship with Jamie, Rich has finally had enough and wi

recommendations.title: Every Day
recommendations.overview: 16-year old Rhiannon falls in love with a mysterious spirit named “A” that inhabits a different body every day. Feeling an unmatched connection, Rhiannon and “A” work each day to find each other, not knowing what the next day will bring.

recommendations.title: Delirious
recommendations.overview: A soap opera writer gets hit on the head and wakes up as a character in his own show.

recommendations.title: Before I Fall
recommendations.overview: Samantha Kingston has everything. Then, everything changes. After one fateful night, she wakes up with no future at all. Trapped into reliving the same day over and over, she begins to question just how perfect her life really was.

recommendations.title: Big
recommendations.overview: When a young boy makes a wish at a carnival machine to be big—he wakes up the following morning to find that it has been granted and his body has grown older overnight. But he is still the same 13-year-old boy inside. Now he must learn how to cope wi

recommendations.title: Hilda and the Mountain King
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Fantasy, Family, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: When Hilda wakes up in the body of a troll, she must use her wits and courage to get back home, become human again — and save the city of Trolberg.

recommendations.title: The Beauty Inside
recommendations.overview: Woo-jin, a furniture designer who wakes up in a different body every day, falls for Yi-soo, a woman he meets through his work.

recommendations.title: Space Jam
recommendations.genres: Family, Animation, Science Fiction, Fantasy, Comedy
recommendations.overview: With their freedom on the line, the Looney Tunes seek the help of NBA superstar Michael Jordan to win a basketball game against a team of moronic aliens.
